data.pageDescription: Explore a collection of blog articles written by Graziano Casto.

metadata.title: Making Efficiency a Platform Capability
metadata.excerpt: Stop treating cloud efficiency as a quarterly cleanup. Learn how to transform optimization into a core platform capability by bridging the gap between SRE reliability and FinOps goals.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: I Watched a Microsoft Java Champion Talk About K8s Efficiency. Here is What I Learned.
metadata.excerpt: Why 60% of Java workloads on Kubernetes are wasting money and the 4 lessons from Microsoft & Akamas to fix it.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: The State of Java on Kubernetes 2026: Why Defaults are Killing Your Performance
metadata.excerpt: Most Java apps on Kubernetes still use bad defaults. Learn how to fix them to cut waste, boost performance, and avoid hidden latency issues.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Kubernetes 1.35: In-Place Pod Resizing is Finally GA. Is it the End of Pod Restarts?
metadata.excerpt: Kubernetes 1.35 makes resources mutable. Here is how In-Place Resizing works under the hood and where it still requires caution.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Kubernetes v1.35: Timbernetes (The World Tree Release)
metadata.excerpt: Kubernetes v1.35 introduces 60 enhancements including 17 stable features. Discover the latest improvements in security, scheduling, and resource management in this comprehensive release.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Kubernetes v1.35 Sneak Peek
metadata.excerpt: Explore the upcoming features in Kubernetes v1.35, including node declared features, in-place pod resource updates, and native pod certificates, along with important deprecations like cgroup v1 removal.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Kubernetes v1.34: Of Wind & Will (O' WaW)
metadata.excerpt: Kubernetes v1.34 introduces 58 enhancements including 23 stable features, from Dynamic Resource Allocation (DRA) GA to KYAML support. Discover the latest improvements in security, scheduling, and resource management in this comprehensive release.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: The Ephemeral Cloud: A New Blueprint for Infrastructure Efficiency With Crossplane and kube-green
metadata.excerpt: Use Crossplane and kube-green to replace wasteful, always-on cloud environments with on-demand, ephemeral ones, dramatically cutting costs and environmental impact.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: From Chaos to Clarity: Navigating Observability in the Platform Engineering Era (and a Dash of AI)
metadata.excerpt: A comprehensive recap of the KCD New York roundtable discussion on Platform Engineering and Observability, exploring key challenges, solutions, and the role of AI in modern observability practices.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: WebAssembly: From Browser Plugin to the Next Universal Runtime
metadata.excerpt: Explore WebAssembly's evolution from a browser performance booster to a universal runtime reshaping cloud, edge, and distributed computing with near-native performance across platforms.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Kubernetes v1.34 Sneak Peek
metadata.excerpt: Discover the exciting enhancements coming in Kubernetes v1.34, including stable Dynamic Resource Allocation, improved scheduling capabilities, and enhanced security features for production workloads.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: AI-Native Platforms: The Unstoppable Alliance of GenAI and Platform Engineering
metadata.excerpt: Discover how Generative AI is transforming platform engineering from static toolsets into intelligent, dynamic, and self-optimizing ecosystems that unlock 100% of platform potential.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Cognitive Architecture: How LLMs Are Reshaping Software Architecture
metadata.excerpt: Discover how Large Language Models are transforming software design from traditional service-oriented architectures to cognitive, agent-driven systems that reason and act autonomously.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Java's Next Act: Native Speed for a Cloud-Native World
metadata.excerpt: Explore how the Graal Stack is reinventing Java for the cloud era, combining GraalVM, Micronaut, and GraalOS to deliver ultra-fast, lightweight, and serverless-ready applications that address traditional Java limitations.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Breaking the Context Barrier of LLMs: InfiniRetri vs RAG
metadata.excerpt: Compare InfiniRetri and RAG approaches for LLM information retrieval, exploring their unique strengths, limitations, and potential hybrid solutions for overcoming context limitations.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Are You Sure You Really Want to Become a DevRel?
metadata.excerpt: A personal reflection on two years as a Developer Relations Engineer, sharing honest insights about the role's challenges, rewards, and how context shapes the DevRel experience in different organizations.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: AI Agents: Future of Automation or Overhyped Buzzword?
metadata.excerpt: Explore the reality behind AI agents - autonomous systems that perceive, decide, and act independently. Discover their potential to revolutionize automation while understanding the challenges and limitations.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: The Energy Efficiency of JVMs and the Role of GraalVM
metadata.excerpt: Explore the correlation between energy efficiency and code performance in the JVM ecosystem, discovering why GraalVM stands out as a top-tier runtime for optimizing both performance and environmental impact.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Platform Journey Map: Shape Your Platform Strategy
metadata.excerpt: Discover the Platform Journey Map, a visual game designed to spark meaningful discussions about platform strategy and priorities, moving beyond technology debates to focus on people and clear strategic direction.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Finding Observability and DevEx Tranquility with Platform Engineering
metadata.excerpt: Learn how to navigate the stormy seas of monitoring data by integrating observability as a first-class citizen in platform engineering, avoiding complexity while providing meaningful insights.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: 2024 Wrapped: My Year as a DevRel Buddy
metadata.excerpt: A comprehensive review of my first year as a Developer Relations Engineer, highlighting community engagement, speaking opportunities, and the journey of sharing knowledge across international tech events.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Platform Engineering: A Workshop to Help Map Your Strategy
metadata.excerpt: Discover how Mia-Platform's game-like workshop helps organizations define their internal developer platform strategy by bringing together stakeholders to answer the crucial 'why' behind platform engineering initiatives.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: GreenOps and FinOps: The Perfect Pitch Toward Business and Environmental Goals
metadata.excerpt: Learn how integrating GreenOps and FinOps methodologies helps organizations achieve both business objectives and environmental sustainability goals while optimizing IT costs and reducing carbon footprint.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Using GreenOps to Improve Your Operational Efficiency and Save the Planet
metadata.excerpt: Discover how GreenOps practices can help reduce your infrastructure's environmental impact while improving operational efficiency, featuring practical solutions like kube-green for sustainable Kubernetes operations.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: What the Fu** Does Cloud Native Mean?
metadata.excerpt: A critical examination of what 'Cloud Native' truly means, challenging the misconception that simply running applications in the cloud automatically qualifies them as modern, scalable, or resilient.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Green Cloud Native Apps: Optimize Kubernetes for Renewable Energy
metadata.excerpt: Learn how to enhance the environmental sustainability of cloud-native applications using open-source tools and Kubernetes optimizations to reduce carbon footprint and align with renewable energy sources.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Are You Truly Agile or Just a Monkey Scrum Practitioner?
metadata.excerpt: Explore the fundamental differences between Agile and Scrum, understanding how Agile represents a mindset and way of life while Scrum provides specific project management practices.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto

metadata.title: Welcome to My Digital Corner!
metadata.excerpt: A personal introduction to my digital space where I share insights about cloud-native technologies, my professional journey, and the importance of communication and storytelling in tech.
metadata.author: Graziano Casto
